text:
Sure.  I call that story:

I read in the paper yesterday.

A very famous woman poet won the Pulitzer?!

That’s great... but the prize-winning poem was something else... something you'd call.

All about...

a raven.

A famous poem. 

A raven.

A black bird.

Somehow it feels... familiar.

A raven...does that?

Oh yes.

A raven.

A black one.

There you have it.

That would be good news.

Of course this is London.

So you don’t read Shakespeare?

You read him.

But would that be him?

That depends

who you were reading<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
